zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Wadham於1367年出生在英國戴文布藍斯可姆時，她的父親Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield23歲，母親Joan de Wrottesley17歲。她和Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1423年4月25日在英國薩默塞特布利其沃特享年56歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特度斯東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Wadham于1367年出生在英国戴文布藍斯可姆时，她的父亲Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield23岁，母亲Joan de Wrottesley17岁。她和Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1423年4月25日在英国薩默塞特布利其沃特享年56岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特度斯東。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Wadham was born in 1367, in Branscombe, Devon, England, her father, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, was 23 and her mother, Joan de Wrottesley, was 17. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. She died on 25 April 1423, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Durston, Somerset, England.

fr.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Wadham est née en 1367, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wrottesley, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1423, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Durston, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Wadham 1367 in Branscombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield 23 und ihre Mutter Joan de Wrottesley 17. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. April 1423 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bridgwater, Somerset, England und wurde in Durston, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Wadham è nata il nel 1367 nel Branscombe, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Joan de Wrottesley, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Morì il 25 aprile 1423, nel Bridgwater, Somerset, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Durston, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Wadhamが1367年にイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifieldは23歳，母Joan de Wrottesleyは17歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Hill of Shilston Srとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1423年4月25日にイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで56歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Wadham(이)가 1367년 영국 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Wrottesley(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 4월 25일 영국 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 뒤르스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Wadham nasceu em 1367, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Wrottesley, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1423, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Durston, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Wadham родилась в 1367 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wrottesley, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Она умерла 25 апреля 1423 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности дурстон, сомирсет, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Murió el 25 de abril de 1423, en Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Durston, Somerset, Inglaterra.
